 def sym_norm_adj(adj):

-    """Symmetric normalization: D^{-1/2} (A + I) D^{-1/2}"""

     adj = adj + torch.eye(adj.size(0), device=adj.device)

     degree = adj.sum(dim=1)

     d_inv_sqrt = torch.pow(degree, -0.5)

@@ -13,81 +12,113 @@
     return D_inv_sqrt @ adj @ D_inv_sqrt

 

 

+class DilatedCausalConv(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size=2, dilation=1):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.padding = (kernel_size - 1) * dilation

+        self.conv = nn.Conv2d(in_ch, out_ch, (kernel_size, 1), dilation=(dilation, 1))

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        x = F.pad(x, (0, 0, self.padding, 0))

+        return self.conv(x)

+

+

+class GatedTCN(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size=2, dilation=1, dropout=0.1):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.filter_conv = DilatedCausalConv(in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size, dilation)

+        self.gate_conv = DilatedCausalConv(in_ch, out_ch, kernel_size, dilation)

+        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm2d(out_ch)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        filter_out = torch.tanh(self.filter_conv(x))

+        gate = torch.sigmoid(self.gate_conv(x))

+        return self.dropout(self.bn(filter_out * gate))

+

+

 class GraphConv(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_dim, out_dim):

+    def __init__(self, in_dim, out_dim, num_nodes, K=3, alpha=0.05, adaptive_emb_dim=10):

         super().__init__()

-        self.linear = nn.Linear(in_dim, out_dim)

+        self.linear1 = nn.Linear(in_dim, in_dim)

+        self.linear2 = nn.Linear(in_dim, out_dim)

+        self.K = K

+        self.alpha = alpha

+        self.nodevec1 = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(num_nodes, adaptive_emb_dim))

+        self.nodevec2 = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(adaptive_emb_dim, num_nodes))

 

     def forward(self, x, adj_norm):

-        # x: [B, T, N, D]

-        out = self.linear(x)

-        out = torch.einsum('ij,btjd->btid', adj_norm, out)

-        return out

+        B, C, T, N = x.shape

+        x_t = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1).contiguous()

+        h = F.relu(self.linear1(x_t))

+        adp = F.softmax(F.relu(torch.mm(self.nodevec1, self.nodevec2)), dim=1)

+        combined_adj = adj_norm + adp

+        out = h

+        for _ in range(self.K):

+            out = self.alpha * h + (1 - self.alpha) * torch.einsum('ij,btjd->btid', combined_adj, out)

+        out = self.linear2(out)

+        return out.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).contiguous()

 

 

-class TemporalConv(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size=3):

+class STBlock(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, residual_ch, hidden_ch, num_nodes, kernel_size=2, dilation=1,

+                 graph_K=3, graph_alpha=0.05, adaptive_emb_dim=10, dropout=0.1):

         super().__init__()

-        self.conv = nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, (kernel_size, 1), padding=(kernel_size // 2, 0))

-        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels)

+        self.tcn1 = GatedTCN(residual_ch, hidden_ch, kernel_size, dilation, dropout)

+        self.graph_conv = GraphConv(hidden_ch, hidden_ch, num_nodes, graph_K, graph_alpha, adaptive_emb_dim)

+        self.tcn2 = GatedTCN(hidden_ch, hidden_ch, kernel_size, 1, dropout)

+        self.residual_conv = nn.Conv2d(hidden_ch, residual_ch, (1, 1)) if residual_ch != hidden_ch else nn.Identity()

+        self.skip_conv = nn.Conv2d(hidden_ch, hidden_ch, (1, 1))

+        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm2d(hidden_ch)

 

-    def forward(self, x):

-        # x: [B, C, T, N]

-        return F.gelu(self.bn(self.conv(x)))

+    def forward(self, x, adj_norm):

+        residual = x

+        x = self.tcn1(x)

+        x = self.graph_conv(x, adj_norm)

+        x = self.tcn2(x)

+        s = self.skip_conv(x)

+        x = self.residual_conv(x) + residual

+        return x, s

-        x = self.temporal1(x)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

-        B, C, T, N = x.shape

-        x = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)  # [B, T, N, hidden]

-        x = self.graph_conv(x, adj_norm)  # [B, T, N, hidden]

-        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

-        x = self.temporal2(x)  # [B, out, T, N]

-        return F.gelu(self.bn(x + res))

-class STGCN(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, adj_mx, seq_len=12, pred_len=12, num_nodes=207, hidden_dim=256):

-        super().__init__()

-        adj_norm = sym_norm_adj(adj_mx)

-        self.register_buffer('adj_norm', adj_norm)

         self.seq_len = seq_len

         self.pred_len = pred_len

         self.num_nodes = num_nodes

         self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

+        self.num_layers = num_layers

+        self.kernel_size = kernel_size

+        self.graph_K = graph_K

+        self.graph_alpha = graph_alpha

+        self.adaptive_emb_dim = adaptive_emb_dim

 

-        self.stblock1 = STConvBlock(1, hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

-        self.stblock2 = STConvBlock(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

-        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(0.2)

-        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim * seq_len, pred_len)

+        adj_norm = sym_norm_adj(adj_mx)

+        self.register_buffer('adj_norm', adj_norm)

+

+        self.start_conv = nn.Conv2d(1, hidden_dim, (1, 1))

+        dilations = [2**i for i in range(num_layers)]

+        self.layers = nn.ModuleList()

+        for d in dilations:

+            self.layers.append(STBlock(hidden_dim, hidden_ch=hidden_dim, num_nodes=num_nodes,

+                                        kernel_size=kernel_size, dilation=d,

+                                        graph_K=graph_K, graph_alpha=graph_alpha,

+                                        adaptive_emb_dim=adaptive_emb_dim, dropout=dropout))

+        self.end_conv1 = nn.Conv2d(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, (1, 1))

+        self.end_conv2 = nn.Conv2d(hidden_dim, pred_len, (1, 1))

 

     def forward(self, x):

-        # x: [B, T, N] -> [B, 1, T, N]

-        if x.dim() == 3:

-            x = x.unsqueeze(1)

-

-        x = self.stblock1(x, self.adj_norm)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

-        x = self.stblock2(x, self.adj_norm)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

-

-        B, C, T, N = x.shape

-        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).contiguous()  # [B, N, C, T]

-        x = x.view(B, N, C * T)  # [B, N, C*T]

-        x = self.dropout(x)

-        x = self.fc(x)  # [B, N, pred_len]

-        x = x.permute(0, 2, 1)  # [B, pred_len, N]

+        x = x.unsqueeze(1)  # [B, 1, T, N]

+        x = self.start_conv(x)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

+        skip_sum = 0

+        for layer in self.layers:

+            x, s = layer(x, self.adj_norm)

+            skip_sum = skip_sum + s

+        x = F.gelu(skip_sum)

+        x = F.gelu(self.end_conv1(x))

+        x = self.end_conv2(x)  # [B, pred_len, T, N]

+        x = x[:, :, -1, :]    # [B, pred_len, N]

         return x

+def evaluate_mae_per_horizon(model, loader, mean_t, std_t, device, pred_len=12):

+    model.eval()

+    horizon_mae = torch.zeros(pred_len)

+    horizon_count = torch.zeros(pred_len)

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        for x, y in loader:

+            x, y = x.to(device), y.to(device)

+            pred = model(x)

+            pred_raw = pred * std_t.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0) + mean_t.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0)

+            y_raw = y * std_t.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0) + mean_t.unsqueeze(0).unsqueeze(0)

+            diff = torch.abs(pred_raw - y_raw)  # [B, pred_len, N]

+            horizon_mae += diff.mean(dim=2).sum(dim=0).cpu()

+            horizon_count += diff.size(0)

+    return (horizon_mae / horizon_count).tolist()
